intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 75% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting strong. 5 reps to go. The first one sets your standard for the rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 1/5. Target: 108% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Don't overshoot first 30s — settle in smoothly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 1/5. You're starting fresh. Set the standard for the rest of the workout.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 6:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 108% for 6:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 16 minutes of work done. 35 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/5. You're 37% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/5. 3 to go. You've accumulated 6min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/5. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/5. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 2: 110% for 5:00. Execute each rep with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 4:00. Then 26min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 46% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 4:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 46% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 46% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 53% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 112% for 4:00. Next up: 4:00 recovery, then 3min at 115%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 53% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 53% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 53% done. 112% for 4:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 60% done. 0 intervals left. 18 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 15min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 34 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 18 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 1 reps left. 15 minutes total. Your competition quit 10 minutes ago.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 4/5. 3:00 at 115%. Cadence: 90-100 rpm. Seated. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 67% through the session. Every pedal stroke is making you faster. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 1 intervals left. 15 total minutes. Your lungs are burning. That's adaptation.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 73% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 18min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 73% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last one. Your body is lying — you have more. Prove it. Then you can rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 2:00 at 120%. Then 10min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This one is harder than the last. That's exactly how it should be. You're adapting. You're improving.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 2:00 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 120% × 2:00. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 82% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 82% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 82% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
